/usr/bin/ar qc /home/cyapp/starseeker/GeometricTools/GTE/lib/Static/libgtmathematicsgpu.a CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2AdjustVelocity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2ComputeDivergence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2EnforceStateBoundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2InitializeSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2InitializeState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2SolvePoisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid2UpdateState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3AdjustVelocity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3ComputeDivergence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3EnforceStateBoundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3InitializeSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3InitializeState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3SolvePoisson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GPUFluid3UpdateState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gtmathematicsgpu.dir/GTMathematicsGPU.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib /home/cyapp/starseeker/GeometricTools/GTE/lib/Static/libgtmathematicsgpu.a
